\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[Epsilon]^{i j k} \[Omega]^{i} D[F, \[Omega]^j] D[G, \[Omega]^k], {i,1,3},{j,1,3},{k,1,3}] ]; \end{implementation} \subsection{Hamiltonian and Equations of Motion} \begin{definition}[Hamiltonian] The Hamiltonian of the gyro–quantum system is a sum of kinetic, magnetic, quantum, and coupling terms, \[ H(\Psi,\pi) = T_{\text{kinetic}} + U_{\text{magnetic}} + U_{\text{quantum}} + H_{\text{coupling}}. \]
